nasb.text: And He left them again, and went away and prayed a third time, saying the same thing once more.

esv.text: So, leaving them again, he went away and prayed for the third time, saying the same words again.

cnv.text: 他又離開他們，第三次去禱告，說的也是同樣的話。

ccb.text: 耶稣再次离开他们，第三次去祷告，说的是同样的话。

csbs.text: 耶稣又离开他们，第三次去祷告，又说了同样的话。
